title: Group By - Month/Quarter/Year
excerpt: When using the “Group By” function on a date or timeline column I am only shown groups in relation to the current date. Can functionality be added to allow us to define the groupings on a month/quarter/year basis?

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the “Group By” function on a date or timeline column I am only shown groups in relation to the current date. Can functionality be added to allow us to define the groupings on a month/quarter/year basis?
